getAll: select text, dateAndTime from diaryEntries where userId = ?
getAllLabelsForUser: select label from labels where ID in (select labelId from linkDiaryAndLabels where diaryID in (select ID from diaryEntries where userId = ?))
getLabelsPerEntry: select label from labels inner join linkDiaryAndLabels on labels.ID = linkDiaryAndLabels.labelID where diaryID = ?
